intro: Driven by my passion for the German language, I chose to pursue a career as a linguist. Currently, I'm doing my master course at Yonsei university.
Driven by my interest in Korean language education, I completed the Korean Language Teacher Training Program at Seoul National University's Language Education Institute.
I am a dedicated and hardworking individual who always strives for excellence and gives my absolute best in every task I undertake.

My research focuses on German linguistics, with a particular interest in German as a Foreign Language (DaF). My ultimate goal is to develop educational models that provide meaningful support to learners of the German language.
education: M.A. in German Language and Literature, Yonsei University (Expected Mar 2026 – Feb 2028)
Completed Korean Language Teacher Training Program, Language Education Institute, Seoul National University (Jan 2026 – Feb 2026)
B.A. in German Language and Literature, Chungbuk National University (Mar 2019 – Feb 2024)
activity: Korea Representative for the Goethe-Institut project 'Jugend kocht!' (Aug 2021)
Exchange Student in Berlin, Germany (Berliner Hochschule für Technik (BHT), 2022.09~2023.02)
Short-term Exchange Student in London, UK(Regent's university London, 2023.08)
